/CAL: STATUS OF FELONY REFILE/X: COUNSEL STIPULATES TO THE RE-FILING OF THE ORIGINAL CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT,/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR RELEASE IS DENIED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/STIPLD: 05-23-22(10TH)/X: STIPULATED 60TH DAY IS 07-08-22,/BAIL:25,000/VD: 05-18-22 PTC & 05-24-22 JT DATES IN D17/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 3HOURS/

/CAL  PRELIMINARY HEARING/X  DA IS NOT SEEKING HOLDING ORDERS ON COUNTS 1AND 15; COUNTS 10 AND 15 ARE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1385,/WIT SWORN: SFPD OFFICER TIMOTHY SCOTT/WIT SWORN: DA INVESTIGATOR JESSICA ZAMORA/WIT SWORN: SFPD OFFICER GREGORY YEE/WIT SWORN: SFPD OFFICER COLIN RYAN/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 1- PRINTOUT FROM CA DMV/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 2- STILL SHOT FROM BODY WORN CAMERA FOOTAGE/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 3- STILL SHOT FROM BODYWORN CAMERA FOOTAGE/871D: 1 AND 2/CTORD: COUNTS 3, 4, 6 AND 8 ARE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1385/CTORD: COUNTS 7, 9, 11, 12, 13, 14,AND 16 (ALL MISDEMEANORS) ARE CERTIFIED/BAIL: 25000/NTW/LDTR: 06-06-22//CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE IN DEPARTMENT 50 ON 05-09-22/DOP/CONTD:PRETRIALCONFERENCE IN DEPARTMENT 17 ON 05-18-22/DOP/CONTD:JURY TRIAL IN DEPARTMENT17 ON 05-24-22/DOP/CTORD: EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO SUBMITTING PARTY FOR SAFEKEEPING/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT CONTEMPT DISPO AND RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT FOR NON COMPLIANCE/X: DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE COURT NOS 2520141, 22000664, 22002486 AND 22003846 IS FILED,/CTORD: DEFENDANT WAS NOT IN CONTEMPT FOR 04-11-22 FAILURE TO APPEAR/SAWD/BAIL: 10000/LDTR: 05-25-22/30    CACMELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODYASSESSMENT,/CONTD:HEARING ON DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE COURT NOS 2520141,22000664, 22002486 AND 22003846 AND RECEIPT OF ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:ACM TRANSPORT TO FATHER ALFRED'S/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ENTER AND COMPLETE FATHER ALFRED'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO BE TRANSPORTED TO FATHER ALFRED'S ON 04-05-22, BY ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO CALL ACMONCE A WEEK/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ONPRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF FATHER ALFRED'SUNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE OR APPOVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES AND HE MAY ENGAGE IN ANY OUTSIDE ACTIVITY PROVIDED BY THE PROGRAM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO FOLLOW THE ACTIVE CPO FILED ON 01-21-21, INCASE NUMBER22000644/X:PARTIES CONFIRMED TRIAL DATE/ /CONTD:TRIAL & STATUSOF PROGRAM/DOPU:IN PROGRAM/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:04-18-22 (30TH DAY)/BAIL:20,000/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO FOLLOW THE ACTIVE CPO FILED ON 01-21-22, IN CASE NUMBER22000644/CONTD:PTC & ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 03-24-22//CONTD:TRIAL ON 04-11-22/DOP/
/CAL: BW COMTEMPT DISPOM SAW IF 4-6-22 AND STATUS OF M99 22003846/NP/4011,5PC/CONT/DOPC/
/CAL:TRIAL/FTRRECORDED/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:10,000/BWNUM:1ST/X:2 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/BWRET:50/VD:LAST DAY AND JURY TRIAL/
